Description.en: Area contains a [PowerfulMapBoss|Powerful Map Boss]
Description.zh: 区域内包含一个[PowerfulMapBoss|强力地图首领]

Description.en: Area contains an [ContainsBreach|Otherworldly Breach]
Description.zh: 区域内包含一个[ContainsBreach|异世裂隙]

Description.en: Area contains a [ContainsExpedition|Kalguuran Expedition]
Description.zh: 区域内包含一个[ContainsExpedition|卡古兰先祖迷藏]

Description.en: Area contains a [ContainsDelirium|Delirium Mirror]
Description.zh: 区域内包含一个[ContainsDelirium|惊悸迷雾之镜]

Description.en: Area contains [ContainsRitual|Ritual Altars]
Description.zh: 区域内包含[ContainsRitual|驱灵祭坛]

Description.en: Area has +1 to Monster Level
Description.zh: 区域的怪物等级 +1

Description.en: Area contains many extra [ContainsAbyss|Abysses]
Description.zh: 区域内包含多个额外[ContainsAbyss|深渊]

Description.en: Area contains [ContainsIncursion|Vaal Beacons]
Description.zh: 区域内包含[ContainsIncursion|瓦尔灯塔]

Description.en: Area contains [ContainsAbyss|Abysses]
Description.zh: 区域内包含[ContainsAbyss|深渊]

Description.en: Area contains an important objective
Description.zh: 区域包含一个重要目标

Description.en: Slay the [GreatBeast|Great Beast] to earn [HildasFavour|Hilda's Favour]
Description.zh: 击杀[GreatBeast|巨兽]，赢得[HildasFavour|希尔达的青睐]

Description.en: All [Rarity|Rare] monsters are [Essence] monsters
Description.zh: 区域内所有[Rarity|稀有]怪物均为[Essence|精华]怪物

Description.en: Contains many extra [Strongbox|Strongboxes] with monsters waiting in ambush
Description.zh: 区域内包含多个额外埋伏着怪物的[Strongbox|保险箱]

Description.en: Contains an [AzmeriSpirit|Azmeri Spirit] that will be released when [SpiritPossessed|Possessed] Monsters are slain
Description.zh: 区域内包含一个[AzmeriSpirit|阿兹莫里之灵]，当击杀[SpiritPossessed|附身]怪物时释放。

Description.en: All Monsters are at least [Rarity|Magic]
Description.zh: 区域内所有怪物至少为[Rarity|魔法]怪物

Description.en: Contains 2 additional [RogueExile|Rogue Exiles] and 5 additional Rare Beasts
Description.zh: 区域内包含 2 个额外的[RogueExile|盗贼流放者]和 5 个额外的稀有野兽

Description.en:
Contains 2 additional [Shrine|Shrines]
[Shrine|Shrines] release an [AzmeriSpirit|Azmeri Spirit] when activated
Description.zh:
区域内包含 2 个额外[Shrine|神龛]，
[Shrine|神龛]激活时会释放[AzmeriSpirit|阿兹莫里之灵]

Description.en:
Contains 3 additional [Essence] Packs
[Essence] Packs have an additional [Rarity|Rare] Monster
Description.zh:
区域内包含 3 个额外[Essence|精华]群落，
[Essence|精华]群落额外包含 1 个[Rarity|稀有]怪物

Description.en:
Contains 3 additional [Essence]
[Essence|Essences] transfer to a random Unique Monster on death
Description.zh:
区域包含 3 个 额外[Essence|精华]，
死亡时[Essence|精华]转移至 1 个随机传奇怪物

Description.en:
Contains 2 additional [AzmeriSpirit|Azmeri Spirits]
[AzmeriSpirit|Azmeri Spirits] have 1000% increased maximum Empowerment
Description.zh:
区域包含 2 个额外[AzmeriSpirit|阿兹莫里之灵]，
[AzmeriSpirit|阿兹莫里之灵]的最大强化提高 1000%

Description.en: An [AzmeriSpirit|Azmeri Spirit] moves to a nearby map on completion, eventually ascending to a Sacred Spirit
Description.zh: [AzmeriSpirit|阿兹莫里之灵]在完成时移动到附近地图，最终升华为圣洁万灵

Description.en: The [AzmeriSpirit|Azmeri Spirit] has ascended to a Sacred Spirit
Description.zh: [AzmeriSpirit|阿兹莫里之灵]已升华为圣洁万灵

Description.en: Contains a [Rarity|Unique] [Strongbox]
Description.zh: 包含一个[Rarity|传奇][Strongbox|保险箱]

Description.en:
Contains 3 additional [Strongbox|Strongboxes]
[Strongbox|Strongboxes] are openable twice
Description.zh:
区域包含 3 个额外[Strongbox|保险箱]，
[Strongbox|保险箱]可开启两次

Description.en: Contains 3 additional [Shrine|Shrines]
Description.zh: 区域内包含 3 个额外[Shrine|神龛]

Description.en:
Contains 3 additional [Shrine|Shrines]
[Shrine|Shrines] have 2 additional packs of [ShrineMonster|Worshippers]
Description.zh:
区域内包含 3 个额外[Shrine|神龛]，
[Shrine|神龛]额外拥有 2 组[ShrineMonster|敬拜者]群落

Description.en:
Contains 2 additional [Shrine|Shrines]
[ElementalDamage|Elemental] [Shrine|Shrines] do not appear in area
[Shrine] Duration increased by 1000%
Description.zh:
区域内包含 2 个额外[Shrine|神龛]，
区域内不会出现[ElementalDamage|元素][Shrine|神龛]，
[Shrine|神龛]持续时间提高 1000%

Description.en: [Shrine] Buffs are reapplied when entering the [MapBoss|Map Boss] Arena
Description.zh: 进入[MapBoss|地图首领]竞技场时，[Shrine|神龛]增益会被重新施加

Description.en:
Contains 2 additional [Shrine|Shrines]
[Shrine|Shrines] are [ShrineMonster|Worshipped] by a [RogueExile|Rogue Exile]
Description.zh:
区域内包含 2 个额外[Shrine|神龛]，
[Shrine|神龛]被一名[RogueExile|盗贼流放者]所[ShrineMonster|敬拜]

Description.en:
Contains 2 additional [RogueExile|Rogue Exiles]
[RogueExile|Rogue Exiles] appear in Pairs
Description.zh:
区域内包含 2 个额外[RogueExile|盗贼流放者]，
[RogueExile|盗贼流放者]成对出现

Description.en:
Contains an additional [RogueExile|Rogue Exile] and 2 additional [AzmeriSpirit|Azmeri Spirits]
[RogueExile|Rogue Exiles] are [SpiritPossessed|Possessed] when a Possessed Monster is killed in Area
Description.zh:
区域内包含 1 个额外[RogueExile|盗贼流放者]和 2 个额外[AzmeriSpirit|阿兹莫里之灵]，
当区域内的附身怪物被击杀时，[RogueExile|盗贼流放者]会被[SpiritPossessed|附身]

Description.en:
Contains an additional [StoneSummoningCircle|Summoning Circles]
[StoneSummoningCircle|Summoning Circles] always summon an additional Boss
Description.zh:
区域内包含 1 个额外[StoneSummoningCircle|召唤法阵]，
[StoneSummoningCircle|召唤法阵]总是额外召唤 1 个首领

Description.en: Contains 3 additional [StoneSummoningCircle|Summoning Circles]
Description.zh: 包含 3 个额外的[StoneSummoningCircle|召唤法阵]

Description.en: World Area has been manipulated and cannot be manipulated again
Description.zh: 世界区域已被操控，无法再次操控

Description.en: Contains a [ContainsBreach|Breach Hive]
Description.zh: 包含一个[ContainsBreach|裂隙巢穴]

Description.en: Contains a manifestation of [ContainsDelirium|Delirium] that requires 100% [Delirious|Delirousness] to enter
Description.zh: 区域内包含一个[ContainsDelirium|惊悸迷雾]的拟像，需要 100% [Delirious|亢奋]度方可进入

Description.en: Contains an extra of each type of content
Description.zh: 额外包含每种类型的内容各一个

Description.en: 50% increased [Rarity] of items found in area
Description.zh: 区域内找到的物品[Rarity|稀有度]提高 50%

Description.en: [MapBoss|Map Boss] drops a [Rarity|Unique] item
Description.zh: [MapBoss|地图首领]会掉落一件[Rarity|传奇]物品

Description.en: [MapBoss|Map Boss] drops an [UltimatumKey|Inscribed Ultimatum]
Description.zh: [MapBoss|地图首领]会掉落一个[UltimatumKey|贪婪战书]

Description.en: [MapBoss|Map Boss] drops a [SanctumKey|Djinn Barya]
Description.zh: [MapBoss|地图首领]会掉落一个[UltimatumKey|巨灵币]

Description.en: [MapBoss|Map Boss] is [SpiritPossessed|Possessed]
Description.zh: [MapBoss|地图首领]被[SpiritPossessed|附身]

Description.en: Monsters are [Gigantic], have 50% reduced pack size and drop 50% increased items
Description.zh: 怪物为[Gigantic|庞然大物]，群落规模降低 50%，掉落物品增加 50%

Description.en: Currency found is replaced with rarer varieties
Description.zh: 找到的通货替换为更稀有的种类

Description.en:
Contains an additional [StoneSummoningCircle|Summoning Circle]
[StoneSummoningCircle|Summoning Circle] Bosses have increased difficulty and reward per power of enemy slain
Description.zh:
区域内包含 1 个额外[StoneSummoningCircle|召唤法阵]，
[StoneSummoningCircle|召唤法阵]的首领难度和奖励根据所杀敌人的威力值而提高

Description.en: When Players Kill a Rare Monster they will gain 1 of its Modifiers for 20 seconds
Description.zh: 击杀稀有怪物时，获得其一条词缀，持续 20 秒

Description.en: Contains 5 additional [AzmeriSpirit|Azmeri Spirits]
Description.zh: 区域内包含 5 个额外[AzmeriSpirit|阿兹莫里之灵]

Description.en: Contains 3 additional [MapBoss|Map Bosses] throughout the area
Description.zh: 区域内包含 3 个额外[MapBoss|地图首领]

Description.en: Area has 2 additional random Waystone Modifiers
Description.zh: 区域内额外增加 2 条随机引路石词缀

Description.en: Doubles Effect of [Tablet|Tablets] used on Area
Description.zh: 应用于区域的[Tablet|石板]效果翻倍

Description.en:
1000% increased [ExceptionalItem|Exceptional Items] found in Area
Monster may drop any[ExceptionalItem|Exceptional Items]
Description.zh:
区域内发现的[ExceptionalItem|卓越物品]数量提高 100%，
怪物可能掉落任何[ExceptionalItem|卓越物品]

Description.en: Also counts as a [Biome|Water] Area
Description.zh: 同时也视作[Biome|水域]地貌

Description.en: Also counts as a [Biome|Mountain] Area
Description.zh: 同时也视作[Biome|山地]地貌

Description.en: Also counts as a [Biome|Grass] Area
Description.zh: 同时也视作[Biome|草地]地貌

Description.en: Also counts as a [Biome|Forest] Area
Description.zh: 同时也视作[Biome|森林]地貌

Description.en: Also counts as a [Biome|Swamp] Area
Description.zh: 同时也视作[Biome|沼泽]地貌

Description.en: Also counts as a [Biome|Desert] Area
Description.zh: 同时也视作[Biome|沙漠]地貌

Description.en: Doryani has spotted [ImmuredFury|The Immured Fury] in this Area
Description.zh: 多里亚尼在该区域发现了[ImmuredFury|禁锢之怒]

Description.en: [Equipment] dropped by monsters is replaced with other items
Description.zh: 怪物掉落的[Equipment|装备]被替换为其他物品

Description.en: Monsters grant 100% increased Experience
Description.zh: 怪物提供的经验值提高 100%

Description.en: Gold dropped by monsters is replaced with other items
Description.zh: 怪物掉落的金币被替换为其他物品

Description.en:
Players have unlimited [LimitedRespawn|Revivals] in area
Monsters have 100% increased [MonsterEffectiveness|Effectiveness]
Description.zh:
玩家在区域内拥有无限的[LimitedRespawn|复活]次数
怪物[MonsterEffectiveness|效能]提高 100%

Description.en: 100% increased [Rarity] of items found in area
Description.zh: 区域内找到的物品[Rarity|稀有度]提高 100%

Description.en: 5 [Rarity|Rare] Monsters are Duplicated
Description.zh: 5 只[Rarity|稀有]怪物被复制

Description.en: Area contains a [GrandExpedition|Grand Expedition]
Description.zh: 区域内包含一个[GrandExpedition|宏大先祖秘藏]
